coverage.thresholdPolicy: Measured baseline minus roughly two points, floored to whole percent, never below current maintenance margin.

contractAdjustments.change: The Test step now runs npm run test:coverage.
Workflow evidence accepts npm test or npm run test:coverage as the required test command.
The CI evidence test command is now npm run test:coverage and expects coverage thresholds to pass.
The full-test expectation now documents coverage threshold evidence.
The Node v249 security-maintenance proof now recognizes the current coverage test command in the workflow evidence file.

focusedTests.command: npx vitest run test/workflowEvidenceVerification.test.ts test/nodeEvidenceWorkflow.test.ts test/dependabotConfig.test.ts test/ciEvidenceCommandProfile.test.ts test/ciEvidenceHardeningPacket.test.ts test/productionReadinessSummaryIndex.test.ts test/auditCredentialResolverApprovalRequiredReadinessRoutes.test.ts test/managedAuditManualSandboxConnectionCredentialResolverImplementationPlanDraft.test.ts test/managedAuditManualSandboxConnectionRehearsalGuard.test.ts -- --testTimeout=180000

coverage.note: Vitest printed a worker shutdown timeout notice after the successful coverage summary, but the process exited with code 0 and all thresholds passed.

parallelProjectStatus.java: recommended parallel; Node v2116 uses only local CI/coverage evidence and does not require fresh Java evidence.
parallelProjectStatus.miniKv: recommended parallel; Node v2116 uses only local CI/coverage evidence and does not require fresh mini-kv evidence.
